title: aggregate-stream output data
description:
A partial-but-honest aggregate over the arms complete NOW.

Every number in ``aggregated_metrics`` / ``per_arm_metrics`` is
reducer-computed (core selected WHICH arms, the reducer computed the values).
``arms_pending`` names what is still coming and from where; ``snapshot_seq``
is monotonic across calls and ``newly_complete`` is the delta since the prior
snapshot. ``arms_regressed`` names any arm that was complete in a prior
snapshot but is not now (disclosed, never masked).

superseded.description: The prior snapshot_seq this call supersedes, or null.
superseded.title: Superseded

newly_complete.description: Arms complete in THIS snapshot that were not in the prior one.
newly_complete.title: Newly Complete

arms_regressed.description: Arms complete in a prior snapshot but not now (disclosed, never masked).
arms_regressed.title: Arms Regressed

aggregated_metrics.description: Reducer weighted-mean over ALL complete arms' task summaries.
aggregated_metrics.title: Aggregated Metrics

per_arm_metrics.description: Per-complete-arm reducer rows (the progressive table), keyed owner:arm.
per_arm_metrics.title: Per Arm Metrics

output_path_local.description: Where the partial metrics_aggregate.json was written.
output_path_local.title: Output Path Local

ownership_dedup.description: Multi-parent ownership accounting (raced cells dropped to their owner), or null.
ownership_dedup.title: Ownership Dedup

disagreement.description: Announce-vs-status-reporter census disagreement per parent, or null.
disagreement.title: Disagreement

StreamArmPending.description: One still-draining arm, disclosed by name (the never-silent-cap rule).

owner_run_id.description: The parent run whose leg still owes this arm.
owner_run_id.title: Owner Run Id

StreamArmPending.title: aggregate-stream pending arm
